title: Apply Discount Coupon at Checkout
goal: apply a discount coupon code during checkout
benefit: I can save money on my purchase
acceptance_criteria: Given a valid coupon code, the system applies the discount to the cart total
Given an expired coupon, the system shows 'Coupon expired' error
Given an already-used coupon (single-use), the system shows 'Coupon already used' error
Given a coupon not applicable to items in cart, show 'Coupon not applicable' error
Discount must be reflected in the order summary before payment
Coupon code field accepts max 20 characters, alphanumeric only
Only one coupon can be applied per order
Coupon discount cannot reduce order total below $0.01
Coupon must be validated server-side before payment processing
business_rules: Minimum order value may be required for coupon applicability
Coupon discount is applied before tax calculation
Admin can mark coupons as active/inactive
